ui.title: SWIFT Queue Status
ui.desc: Displays incoming and outgoing SWIFT messages grouped by status.

data.sql: SELECT CASE C_PROC_STATUS WHEN 'R' THEN 'Inbound Received' WHEN 'P' THEN 'Inbound Pending' WHEN 'F' THEN 'Outbound Failed' WHEN 'S' THEN 'Outbound Dispatched' ELSE C_PROC_STATUS END as "Status", COUNT(*) as "Total" FROM %EXIMSYS%.STP_IN_MSG_STO WHERE C_MSG_TYPE = 'InSwiftForm' AND C_UNIT_CODE = '%USER_BU%' GROUP BY C_PROC_STATUS
